🚨 WE'RE HIRING! 🚨 Brantley Construction is on the hunt for a talented Project Manager to join our South Carolina team! 🏗️ Looking to grow your career in commercial construction? You’ll work on exciting projects across government, institutional, retail, and athletic facilities. 📍 Location: South Carolina 💼 Role: Project Manager 🔗 Apply now or tag someone who should see this! 👉 Know someone perfect for the job? Like, share, or send them our way — we’d love to connect! #Hiring #ConstructionJobs #ProjectManager #SouthCarolinaJobs #BrantleyConstruction #NowHiring #JoinOurTeam
About us
Brantley Construction Company, LLC (BCC) is one of the largest Commercial General Contractors in the tri-county and has been serving clients throughout the Southeast for 49 years. BCC is a family-owned company, as we make each client feel like family. We have vast experience in commercial work including office, retail, medical, industrial, multi-family, and educational. BCC offers a wide range of services including preconstruction, project management, construction management, design-build, build to suit, development, up-fit, property restoration, and LEED. Brantley Construction, founded in 1976, is headquartered in Charleston, SC. We welcome the opportunity to team with you to construct a facility customized to your needs. For more information, please visit www.brantleyconstruction.com.
